_provenance: Fixed-velocity scaling sweep, run on Colab T4 GPU (CUDA) via scripts/colab_scaling.py; output pasted from the Colab session (the matrix_exp regularizer is CPU-fallback on MPS, so large-N runs on CUDA). Total runtime 565s. The N=48-144 matched-dose comparison is in fs_scaling.json (MPS).
per_seed_note: every N, every seed: distance < shuffled at matched accuracy (~1.000); saving positive but shrinking with N under fixed velocity
